ksa_text: Manage ongoing data and AI program operations, including monitoring execution schedules, coordinating responses to operational issues, automating routine operations, and capacity planning for anticipated resource needs.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to execute technology integration processes.

nice.top_element_label: Skill in executing command line tools

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-002 (OP, Task) maps to Bioinformatics Technician scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4340 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: onet=0.434, ddat=0.417, dcwf=0.406. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4340 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-002 (OP, composite 0.4340) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles does not surface this OP-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4340 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for OP domain content at composite 0.4340 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4340, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
